'''鈭歵-m-n-ch''' ('''katamnechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molly|molly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molly|molly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-m-n-ch
|-
! Lemma
| katamnechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitamnechoko|thitamnechoko]] || [[word:jitamnechoko|jitamnechoko]] || [[word:shitamnechoko|shitamnechoko]] || [[word:kitamnechoko|kitamnechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutamnechoko|thuthutamnechoko]] || [[word:jujutamnechoko|jujutamnechoko]] || [[word:shushutamnechoko|shushutamnechoko]] || [[word:kukutamnechoko|kukutamnechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutamnechoko|thutamnechoko]] || [[word:jutamnechoko|jutamnechoko]] || [[word:shutamnechoko|shutamnechoko]] || [[word:kutamnechoko|kutamnechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutamnechoko|thutamnechoko]] || [[word:jutamnechoko|jutamnechoko]] || [[word:shutamnechoko|shutamnechoko]] || [[word:kutamnechoko|kutamnechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetamnechoko|thetamnechoko]] || [[word:jetamnechoko|jetamnechoko]] || [[word:shetamnechoko|shetamnechoko]] || [[word:ketamnechoko|ketamnechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotamnechoko|thothotamnechoko]] || [[word:jojotamnechoko|jojotamnechoko]] || [[word:shoshotamnechoko|shoshotamnechoko]] || [[word:kokotamnechoko|kokotamnechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotamnechoko|thotamnechoko]] || [[word:jotamnechoko|jotamnechoko]] || [[word:shotamnechoko|shotamnechoko]] || [[word:kotamnechoko|kotamnechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotamnechoko|thotamnechoko]] || [[word:jotamnechoko|jotamnechoko]] || [[word:shotamnechoko|shotamnechoko]] || [[word:kotamnechoko|kotamnechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tamnechoko|th忙tamnechoko]] || [[word:j忙tamnechoko|j忙tamnechoko]] || [[word:sh忙tamnechoko|sh忙tamnechoko]] || [[word:k忙tamnechoko|k忙tamnechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatamnechoko|thathatamnechoko]] || [[word:jajatamnechoko|jajatamnechoko]] || [[word:shashatamnechoko|shashatamnechoko]] || [[word:kakatamnechoko|kakatamnechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatamnechoko|thatamnechoko]] || [[word:jatamnechoko|jatamnechoko]] || [[word:shatamnechoko|shatamnechoko]] || [[word:katamnechoko|katamnechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatamnechoko|thatamnechoko]] || [[word:jatamnechoko|jatamnechoko]] || [[word:shatamnechoko|shatamnechoko]] || [[word:katamnechoko|katamnechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
